'''sogataka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:sfnal|sfnal]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-g-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:sfnal|sfnal]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| sogataka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:sogatithi|sogatithi]] || [[word:sogatiji|sogatiji]] || [[word:sogatishi|sogatishi]] || [[word:sogatiki|sogatiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:sogatuthuthu|sogatuthuthu]] || [[word:sogatujuju|sogatujuju]] || [[word:sogatushushu|sogatushushu]] || [[word:sogatukuku|sogatukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:sogatuthu|sogatuthu]] || [[word:sogatuju|sogatuju]] || [[word:sogatushu|sogatushu]] || [[word:sogatuku|sogatuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:sogatufthuf|sogatufthuf]] || [[word:sogatufjuf|sogatufjuf]] || [[word:sogatufshuf|sogatufshuf]] || [[word:sogatufkuf|sogatufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:sogatethe|sogatethe]] || [[word:sogateje|sogateje]] || [[word:sogateshe|sogateshe]] || [[word:sogateke|sogateke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:sogatothotho|sogatothotho]] || [[word:sogatojojo|sogatojojo]] || [[word:sogatoshosho|sogatoshosho]] || [[word:sogatokoko|sogatokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:sogatotho|sogatotho]] || [[word:sogatojo|sogatojo]] || [[word:sogatosho|sogatosho]] || [[word:sogatoko|sogatoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:sogatofthof|sogatofthof]] || [[word:sogatofjof|sogatofjof]] || [[word:sogatofshof|sogatofshof]] || [[word:sogatofkof|sogatofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:sogatÃŸfthÃŸf|sogatÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:sogatÃŸfjÃŸf|sogatÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:sogatÃŸfshÃŸf|sogatÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:sogatÃŸfkÃŸf|sogatÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:sogatÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|sogatÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:sogatÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|sogatÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:sogatÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|sogatÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:sogatÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|sogatÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:sogatÃŸfthÃŸf|sogatÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:sogatÃŸfjÃŸf|sogatÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:sogatÃŸfshÃŸf|sogatÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:sogatÃŸfkÃŸf|sogatÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:sogatÃŸfthÃŸf|sogatÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:sogatÃŸfjÃŸf|sogatÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:sogatÃŸfshÃŸf|sogatÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:sogatÃŸfkÃŸf|sogatÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:sogatÃḊthÃḊ|sogatÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:sogatÃḊjÃḊ|sogatÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:sogatÃḊshÃḊ|sogatÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:sogatÃḊkÃḊ|sogatÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:sogatathatha|sogatathatha]] || [[word:sogatajaja|sogatajaja]] || [[word:sogatashasha|sogatashasha]] || [[word:sogatakaka|sogatakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:sogatatha|sogatatha]] || [[word:sogataja|sogataja]] || [[word:sogatasha|sogatasha]] || [[word:sogataka|sogataka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:sogatafthaf|sogatafthaf]] || [[word:sogatafjaf|sogatafjaf]] || [[word:sogatafshaf|sogatafshaf]] || [[word:sogatafkaf|sogatafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:sogatasha|sogatasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:sogatshÃḋsha|sogatshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:sogatrosha|sogatrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:sogatmusha|sogatmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:sogatyasha|sogatyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gosogatnkshÃḋsha|gosogatnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosogatnkrosha|gosogatnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosogatnkmusha|gosogatnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gosogatnkyasha|gosogatnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:sogagatasha|sogagatasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:sogagatshÃḋsha|sogagatshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:sogagatrosha|sogagatrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:sogagatmusha|sogagatmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:sogagatyasha|sogagatyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gosogagatnkshÃḋsha|gosogagatnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosogagatnkrosha|gosogagatnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosogagatnkmusha|gosogagatnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gosogagatnkyasha|gosogagatnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:segÃḊtasha|segÃḊtasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:segÃḊtshÃḋsha|segÃḊtshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:segÃḊtrosha|segÃḊtrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:segÃḊtmusha|segÃḊtmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:segÃḊtyasha|segÃḊtyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gosegÃḊtnkshÃḋsha|gosegÃḊtnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosegÃḊtnkrosha|gosegÃḊtnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosegÃḊtnkmusha|gosegÃḊtnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gosegÃḊtnkyasha|gosegÃḊtnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:sogfatasha|sogfatasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:sogfatshÃḋsha|sogfatshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:sogfatrosha|sogfatrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:sogfatmusha|sogfatmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:sogfatyasha|sogfatyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gosogfatnkshÃḋsha|gosogfatnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosogfatnkrosha|gosogfatnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosogfatnkmusha|gosogfatnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gosogfatnkyasha|gosogfatnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|59e8839}}
